ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or field of study of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "current_gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the course is offered */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating student engagement in the course */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Rate indicating the completion of course materials */,
  "predicted_score" TEXT /* Predicted final score for the student in the course */,
  "actual_score" REAL /* Actual score achieved by the student in the course */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate of the student in the course */,
  "assignments_submitted" INTEGER /* Number of assignments submitted by the student */,
  "assignments_grade" REAL /* Average grade of the assignments submitted */,
  "quizzes_taken" INTEGER /* Number of quizzes taken by the student */,
  "quiz_average" REAL /* Average score of the quizzes taken */,
  "exam_scores" TEXT /* Scores of different exams in the course */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor or student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  "dropout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping out, if applicable */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student enrolled in the course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
